1.11a: Address: Lending Shared Services Accord Mortgages Limited, Yorkshire House, Yorkshire Drive, Bradford BD5 8LJ
1.11b: Contact Lending Shared Services at the address in 1.11a initially
May be referred to Group Legal at the same address
Lender's own form of Deed of Postponement must be used; other lenders' forms are not accepted
1.7: Lending is not permitted where the borrower and mortgagor are not the same entity
1.14: Firm may act if a member is the seller provided it is a partnership
No conflict of interest must exist or arise
The specific conveyancer acting must not be the seller or an immediate family member of the seller
1.15: Firm may act if a member is the borrower provided it is a partnership
No conflict of interest must exist or arise
The specific conveyancer acting must not be the borrower or an immediate family member of the borrower
3.1.3: Notification of the seller's legal representative's details is not required
3.1.4: Contact details for unrepresented sellers: see 1.11a
3.1.5: Accepted List A ID: Photocard or old style Full Driving Licence
Accepted List A ID: Residence Permit for EU National with passport
Accepted List A ID: EU member state ID card
Accepted List A ID: Foreign National ID card with granted indefinite leave to remain
3.2.3: Notification of the seller's legal representative's details is not required
3.2.4: Contact details for unrepresented sellers: see 1.11a
4.5b: Submit Certificate of Title to the address in 1.11a
4.1: Valuation report is provided if a physical internal inspection occurred and the borrower paid the valuation fee
4.3: Contact for incorrect valuation assumptions: Lending Shared Services at the address in 1.11a
5.1.1: Contact if seller has owned property for less than 6 months: see 1.11a
5.2.1: Contact if seller is not the registered owner: see 1.11a
5.4.4: Do not send environmental or contaminated land reports
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted if the firm subscribes to the PCCB Search Code
Requirements in Part 1 must be met and an unqualified Certificate of Title provided
5.4.6: Search insurance is accepted subject to Part 1 and an unqualified Certificate of Title
5.5.3a: Indemnity insurance is acceptable for planning/building regulation breaches older than 10 years if the valuation is not negative
Enforcement period breaches require a recommendation and formal confirmation of structural soundess; indemnity insurance does not replace this check
Private drainage systems (septic tanks/package plants) must be compliant with legislation
Shared drainage systems require legal arrangements for management, maintenance, access, and cost-sharing
Systems must be registered with the relevant regional agency where required
5.5.3b: Original or copy of planning permission is not required
5.5.3c: Original or copy of building regulation consents is not required
5.5.3d: Certificates of lawful use are only required for commercial-to-residential conversions where planning permission cannot be confirmed
Conveyancer must keep copies of such certificates on file
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if only part of the property is affected
Title must include enforceable rights for support, shelter, repair, and entry
5.8.1: Security for converted buildings (max 4 flats) must be the leasehold title
If borrower owns the freehold, it must be included in the security
Lease must contain adequate management and maintenance covenants
Lender will only lend on one flat in the building
5.8.5: Security must include the freehold reversion of the other flat(s)
If borrower only owns a share of freehold, a trust deed or confirmation is required to ensure simultaneous transfer of interests upon sale
5.13.1: Contact for second charges or funding of purchase balance: see 1.11a
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance for absentee/insolvent landlords is accepted if it resolves the issue and Certificate of Title is unqualified
Copy of policy must be retained on file
5.14.17a: Documentation is generally not required prior to completion except for building safety issues
5.14.17b: Building Safety Act requirements apply to buildings 11m+ in height or with 5+ storeys
Lending is prohibited on un-remediated properties where fire safety works are required unless leaseholders have written confirmation they will not bear costs
Report remediation needs or incorrect valuation assumptions before exchange of contracts
5.14.17c: Building safety instructions in 5.14.17a and 5.14.17b apply to remortgages
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term must be 85 years from completion
5.14.9: Initial ground rent must not exceed £1,000 per annum
Ground rent must not increase during the first 21 years
Reviews must not occur more frequently than every 21 years
Increases are capped at the higher of 100% of the previous rent or the RPI percentage change
5.14.10: Contact for service charge matters: see 1.11a
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance for unsatisfactory lease terms is accepted if it resolves the issue and Certificate of Title is unqualified
5.14.12: Ground rent or service charge receipts do not need to be sent to the lender
5.14.13: Evidence of notice of service does not need to be sent but must be retained on file
5.15.2a: Rentcharges/service charges on freeholds must allow 2 months' written notice to remedy breaches and provide notice to the lender
Any re-entry lease created for non-payment must be surrendered upon payment of reasonable costs
Annual rentcharge/service charge must not exceed £500
Charges must not more than double every 25 years
Deed must contain maintenance covenants for common facilities
Indemnity insurance is only accepted for historic non-collected rentcharges (12+ years) not related to services
5.15.2b: Management company share certificates do not need to be sent
5.15.2c: Blank stock transfer forms do not need to be sent
5.15.2d: Management company Memorandum and Articles of Association do not need to be sent
5.16.2: Contact for search entry issues: see 1.11a
5.17.5a: Powers of attorney do not need to be sent
5.17.5b: Statutory declarations of non-revocation do not need to be sent
5.19.1: Lender does not participate in shared equity or shared ownership except for Government Help to Buy (England/Wales)
5.20.1: Report solar PV panel leases that do not meet UK Finance minimum requirements to 1.11a
5.20.3: Solar PV panel lease break clauses must make the provider responsible for removal costs and damage repair
5.20.4: Details of Green Deal Plans must be disclosed to 1.11a

Accepted warranties: Q Policy (Residential/Bespoke Detached), Protek, Advantage, ICW (requires flat roof endorsement if >10sqm)
Accepted warranties: Ark Residential (requires garage endorsement), One Guarantee, TMSC, HomeProof (Aedis)
6.7.4: Professional Consultant's Certificates (PCC) accepted on the standard UK Finance form
Project must have been supervised/inspected from the start; retrospective certificates not accepted
PCC accepted for max 4 units in a structure and max 10 units in a development
6.8.1: Agreements/bonds for unadopted roads/sewers and retentions are not required by the lender
6.9.1: Indemnity insurance required if missing easements cannot be rectified
Lender will not charge 'part' of a title; adjoining land must be charged if it contains access/services
6.10.2: Retentions are released to the borrower unless otherwise authorized
Instalments of the advance are released to the conveyancer
6.13.1: Contact for undischarged improvement/repair grants: see 1.11a
7.3: Consent to mortgage for occupants 17+ is incorporated into deed ACCL 0002
Consent not required for Buy to Let loans provided tenancy conditions are met
8.1: Advising third parties is permitted if there is no conflict and the document is not challengeable
9.2: Indemnity insurance must equal at least the mortgage advance and protect the borrower, successors, and mortgagee

10.2b: Notice if final inspection required: 11 working days
Funds are transmitted on the working day prior to completion
10.3: Deductions include Funds Transfer Fee and Higher Lending Charge if specified in the offer
10.7: Return funds via CHAPS within 1 working day if completion delayed
Bank: National Westminster Bank Plc, Bradford City Centre
Borrower name and account number must be quoted to avoid interest charges
10.11: Interest on delayed return of funds is charged at the mortgage rate
